metadata.title: FLF Quality Router Pipeline
metadata.description: Conditional routing pipeline that selects optimal FLF model based on budget tier. Demonstrates ComfyUI multi-path video generation pattern.
metadata.author: comfyui-workflow-mastery postgrad-18
metadata.notes: This workflow shows how Partner Nodes for different video APIs can be organized in a quality-tiered pipeline. In production, use API-level routing outside ComfyUI.

inputs.text: The character transitions smoothly between poses, cinematic lighting, professional quality

widgets_values:
=== FLF MODEL SELECTION GUIDE ===

Budget Tier → Model Selection:

💰 Ultra-Budget (¥0.04/8s):
  → Veo 3.1 Fast FLF
  → 1280×720, 24fps, with audio
  → Best: batch production, prototyping

💰 Standard (¥0.16/4s):
  → Vidu Q3 Turbo FLF
  → 1284×716, 24fps, with audio
  → Best: flexible duration (1-16s)

💰 Premium (¥0.44/4s):
  → Vidu Q3 Pro FLF
  → Same resolution, faster generation
  → Best: time-critical production

💰 Max Quality (¥2.52/8s):
  → Veo 3.1 Pro FLF
  → Highest visual quality
  → Best: hero shots, final delivery

=== KEY PARAMETERS ===

Veo 3.1: aspectRatio + resolution (720p/1080p/4K)
Vidu Q3: duration (1-16s) + resolution + movementAmplitude

All models support audio output.

=== AUDIO-VIDEO SYNC PATTERNS ===

Pattern 1: Native Audio (Zero Cost)
  Video Model (sound=true) → Output
  Models: Kling V3+, Veo 3.1, Vidu Q3, rhart-s

Pattern 2: Post-Production Mix
  Silent Video → BGM + TTS → FFmpeg amix
  Cost: +¥0.09 (BGM ¥0.07 + TTS ¥0.02)

Pattern 3: Audio-Driven
  TTS/Music → Kling Audio2Video → Output
  Use for: lip sync, music visualization

=== FFMPEG MIXING COMMAND ===
ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -i bgm.mp3 -i narration.mp3 \
  -filter_complex "[1:a]volume=0.3[bg];[2:a]volume=0.8[voice];[bg][voice]amix=inputs=2[mixed]" \
  -map 0:v -map "[mixed]" -c:v copy -c:a aac -shortest output.mp4

=== COMFYUI PARTNER NODE: Veo 3.1 FLF ===

Node: Veo3_1StartEndToVideoNode (hypothetical)
Inputs:
  - first_frame: IMAGE (required)
  - last_frame: IMAGE (optional!)
  - prompt: STRING
  - aspect_ratio: ['16:9', '9:16']
  - duration: 8 (fixed)
  - resolution: ['720p', '1080p', '4k']

Key Insight: lastFrame is OPTIONAL
  → Can be used as enhanced I2V (just first frame)
  → Or true FLF (first + last frame)

Vs Vidu Q3:
  - Vidu: flexible duration 1-16s
  - Veo: fixed 8s but 10x cheaper
  - Vidu: movementAmplitude control
  - Veo: resolution up to 4K

=== COMFYUI PARTNER NODE: Vidu Q3 FLF ===

Node: ViduStartEndToVideoNode
Inputs:
  - first_frame: IMAGE (required)
  - last_frame: IMAGE (required)
  - prompt: STRING
  - duration: INT [1-16]
  - resolution: ['540p', '720p', '1080p']
  - movement_amplitude: ['auto', 'small', 'medium', 'large']
  - audio: BOOLEAN

=== SORA 2 PRO (rhart-s Pro) ===

Key Discovery: Long-form I2V Champion

Specs:
  - Duration: 15s or 25s ONLY
  - Resolution: 1792×1024 (auto-upscaled)
  - Frame Rate: 30fps (higher than industry 24fps)
  - Audio: AAC 96kHz stereo (industry highest)
  - Cost: ¥0.30 (15s) = ¥0.02/second

Storyboard Parameter:
  - storyboard: BOOLEAN (default=false)
  - Potential: multi-scene structured generation
  - TODO: Test with storyboard=true

Best For:
  - Long-form content (15-25s single shot)
  - High resolution needs (1.84MP)
  - Cost-sensitive batch production
  - When audio quality matters (96kHz)

NOT For:
  - Short clips (<10s) → use cheaper models
  - Real-time needs (generation takes 8+ minutes)
  - Square format (only 16:9 or 9:16)
